tool.name: CRAQ
tool.description: assess the accuracy of assembled genomic sequences
tool.command:
## Decision Tree to structure and prepare input files cp '$genome' genome.fa && #if $sms_input: #if $sms_input[0].is_of_type('bam'): cp '${sms_input[0]}' sms_input.bam && samtools index sms_input.bam && #else: #for $i, $f in enumerate($sms_input): cp '$f' 'sms_${i}.${f.ext}' && #end for #end if #end if
#if $ngs_input: #if $ngs_input[0].is_of_type('bam'): cp '${ngs_input[0]}' ngs_input.bam && samtools index ngs_input.bam && #else: #for $i, $f in enumerate($ngs_input): cp '$f' 'ngs_${i}.${f.ext}' && #end for #end if #end if
## Build tool command line craq -g genome.fa #if $sms_input: -sms #if $sms_input[0].is_of_type('bam'): sms_input.bam #else: #set $sms_files = ','.join(['sms_%d.%s' % ($i, $f.ext) for $i, $f in enumerate($sms_input)]) $sms_files #end if #end if
#if $ngs_input: -ngs #if $ngs_input[0].is_of_type('bam'): ngs_input.bam #else: #set $ngs_files = ','.join(['ngs_%d.%s' % ($i, $f.ext) for $i, $f in enumerate($ngs_input)]) $ngs_files #end if #end if
## filter params -sn $filter_params.sn -sf $filter_params.sf -ln $filter_params.ln -lf $filter_params.lf -hmin $filter_params.hmin -hmax $filter_params.hmax -mgs $filter_params.mgs --sms_coverage $filter_params.sms_coverage --ngs_coverage $filter_params.ngs_coverage
## other params $other_params.ser $other_params.snv --gapmodel $other_params.gapmodel $other_params.break --map $other_params.map --mapq $other_params.mapq --norm_window $other_params.norm_window --regional_window $other_params.regional_window $other_params.plot #if $other_params.plot_ids: --plot_ids $other_params.plot_ids #end if --thread $other_params.thread -D outputs

param.name: genome
param.label: Assembly sequence file
param.help: The genome assembly to be evaluated in FASTA format.

param.name: sms_input
param.label: SMS long-read alignment or sequences
param.help: Provide either a single BAM file OR multiple FASTQ files (uncompressed or gzipped). At least one of SMS or NGS input must be provided.

param.name: ngs_input
param.label: NGS short-read alignment or sequences
param.help: Provide either a single BAM file OR multiple FASTQ files (uncompressed or gzipped). At least one of SMS or NGS input must be provided.

param.label: Minimum number of NGS clipped-reads
param.help: Minimum number of NGS reads that must show clipping to flag potential errors.

param.label: Minimum proportion of NGS clipped-reads
param.help: Minimum proportion of NGS reads that must show clipping relative to total coverage.

param.label: Minimum number of SMS clipped-reads
param.help: Minimum number of SMS long reads that must show clipping to flag potential errors.

param.label: Minimum proportion of SMS clipped-reads
param.help: Minimum proportion of SMS reads that must show clipping relative to total coverage.

param.label: Lower clipping rate for heterozygous allele
param.help: Lower clipping rate threshold to identify heterozygous variants (CRHs).

param.label: Upper clipping rate for heterozygous allele
param.help: Upper clipping rate threshold to identify heterozygous variants (CRHs).

param.label: Gap Threshhold
param.help: Length greater than the provided threshold will be treated as breakage

param.label: Average SMS coverage
param.help: Expected average SMS long-read coverage depth for normalization.

param.label: Average NGS coverage
param.help: Expected average NGS short-read coverage depth for normalization.

param.label: Search error regions near breakpoints
param.help: Search noisy error regions near CRE/CSE breakpoints.

param.label: Report SNV/heterozygous variants
param.help: Report small SNV errors or heterozygous variants (resource intensive).

param.label: Gap model
param.help: Gap[N] treatment:

param.label: Break chimeric fragments
param.help: Detect and break chimeric contigs at conflict breakpoints.

param.label: Mapping preset
param.help: Ignored if .bam provided

param.label: Minimum mapping quality
param.help: Minimum read mapping quality threshold.

param.label: Normalization window fraction
param.help: Fraction of the total assembly length used as the window size for normalizing error counts

param.label: Regional quality window size (bp)
param.help: Window size in base pairs for regional quality benchmarking across the assembly.

param.label: Generate plots
param.help: Create CRAQ visualization plots.

param.label: Selected assembly IDs for plotting
param.help: File listing specific assembly IDs to plot (default: all IDs).

param.label: Number of threads
param.help: CPU threads for alignment steps.

tool.help:
**What is CRAQ?**
CRAQ (Clipping Reveals Assembly Quality) is a reference-free genome assembly evaluator that assesses the accuracy of assembled genomic sequences and provides detailed assembly quality assessment from multiple perspectives.
**Inputs**
- **Assembly sequence file (required)**: The genome assembly in FASTA format to be evaluated
- **SMS long-read data (optional)**: Single-Molecule Sequencing data (e.g., PacBio, ONT) - provide ONE BAM alignment file OR ONE OR MORE FASTQ/FASTQ.GZ sequence files
- **NGS short-read data (optional)**: Next-Generation Sequencing data (e.g., Illumina) - provide ONE BAM alignment file OR ONE OR MORE FASTQ/FASTQ.GZ sequence files
*Note: At least one sequencing data input (SMS or NGS) must be provided. Using both SMS and NGS data together provides the most comprehensive assessment.*
